issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (opponent's effect removing character), not 'OnAttacked'. The card responds to opponent effects removing it, not attacks.
Action is 'Rest' but should include a condition to choose 1 ODYSSEY Character. Missing target filter for ODYSSEY type and quantity limit.

Missing second effect entirely. Card has two separate abilities: (1) Counter to opponent removal + Rest ODYSSEY character, (2) End of Your Turn + Activate up to 1 ODYSSEY character. DSL only contains partial first ability.
Condition 'Always' is incorrect. Should reference protection scenario (character being removed by opponent effect).
Missing second effect: trigger 'EndOfTurn', action to set active (likely 'PowerBoost' or equivalent), targeting ODYSSEY Characters with quantity limit of 1.
